'''Nor Fik''' was the lead negotiator for the [[Colicoid/Legends|Colicoids]] who sought total control of the [[Spice/Legends|spice]]-processing operations on [[Nar Shaddaa/Legends|Nar Shaddaa]] prior the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]].

Fik journeyed to [[Rorak 5/Legends|Rorak 5]] to meet with the [[Slavery/Legends|slave]] crime-lord [[Krayn]], who ran the spice factories, in order to complete final negotiations. The Colicoids brought with them the slave trader and advisor "[[Obi-Wan Kenobi/Legends|Bakleeda]]" ([[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] [[Obi-Wan Kenobi/Legends|Obi-Wan Kenobi]] in disguise), who would inspect Krayn's slave-operated factories.

Later confronted by Kenobi and [[Siri Tachi/Legends|Siri Tachi]], Nor Fik was convinced to allow a slave revolt so that the Jedi could ensure Krayn's illegal practices of operation on [[Nar Shaddaa/Legends|Nar Shaddaa]] were shut down permanently.
